title: BEM-734 lint diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:58 (UTC+3)'
workflow_dir=Path('.github/workflows')
violations=[]
files=[]
if workflow_dir.exists():
    for p in sorted(list(workflow_dir.glob('*.yml'))+list(workflow_dir.glob('*.yaml'))):
        txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        files.append(str(p))
        lines=txt.splitlines()
        for i,line in enumerate(lines, start=1):
            if '<<' in line and ('PY' in line or 'EOF' in line or 'MSG' in line):
                violations.append({'file':str(p),'line':i,'rule':'NO_INLINE_HEREDOC','text':line.strip()[:160]})
            if 'python3 - <<' in line or 'python - <<' in line:
                violations.append({'file':str(p),'line':i,'rule':'NO_INLINE_CODE','text':line.strip()[:160]})
        # rough long run block detection
        in_run=False; start=0; count=0
        for i,line in enumerate(lines, start=1):
            if line.strip()=='run: |':
                in_run=True; start=i; count=0
                continue
            if in_run:
                if line.startswith('      - name:') or line.startswith('    - name:') or line.startswith('  ')==False:
                    if count>8:
                        violations.append({'file':str(p),'line':start,'rule':'LONG_RUN_BLOCK_MOVE_TO_SCRIPT','length':count})
                    in_run=False
                else:
                    count+=1
        if in_run and count>8:
            violations.append({'file':str(p),'line':start,'rule':'LONG_RUN_BLOCK_MOVE_TO_SCRIPT','length':count})
status='violations_found' if violations else 'no_violations_found'
state={'schema_version':'workflow_lint_gate_diagnosis.v1','bem':'BEM-734','status':status,'workflow_count':len(files),'violation_count':len(violations),'violations':violations[:200],'blocker':None if not violations else {'code':'WORKFLOW_LINT_GATE_VIOLATIONS','count':len(violations)},'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem734_diagnose_workflow_lint_gate_failures.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem734_diagnose_workflow_lint_gate_failures.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-734 | Workflow Lint Gate Failures Diagnosis | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Workflows scanned: '+str(len(files))+sep+'Violations: '+str(len(violations))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if not violations else json.dumps(state['blocker'],ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem734_diagnose_workflow_lint_gate_failures','status':status,'workflow_count':len(files),'violation_count':len(violations),'blocker':state['blocker'],'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem734_diagnose_workflow_lint_gate_failures.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-734 '+status+' violations='+str(len(violations))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed workflow lint-gate violations causing repeated failed workflow notifications')
"""
No issue comments.
